title: XADD
summary: Appends a new entry to a stream.

sections.title: XADD
sections.text: Appends the specified stream entry to the stream at the specified key. If the key does not exist, a new stream is created.

sections.title: Parameters
sections.text: key: the name of the stream. NOMKSTREAM: optional, do not create the stream if it does not exist. field value: one or more field-value pairs to add to the stream entry.

sections.title: Return value
sections.text: Returns the ID of the added stream entry.

title: JSON
summary: Store and query JSON documents in Redis.

sections.title: Redis JSON
sections.text: The JSON data type lets you store, update, and retrieve JSON values in a Redis database.

sections.title: Example
sections.text: Use JSON.SET to store a document and JSON.GET to retrieve values from it by path.

summary: Reference documentation for all Redis commands.

title: Install Redis
summary: Install Redis Open Source on your platform.

sections.title: Install Redis
sections.text: Install Redis Open Source on Linux, macOS, or Windows.

sections.title: Install Redis Insight
sections.text: Download and install the Redis Insight desktop application.
